title: Developer Host Cutover Planning Stack Normalization
objective: Normalize the remaining repo-owned developer-host cutover planning documents whose top sections still presented the cutover as an active launch phase and whose technical baseline still preserved the retired parent-root publication boundary as current authority.
dependency_note: After Packet 104 normalized the cutover stack itself, the next remaining current-looking residue was the developer-host cutover planning stack. Those docs still carried active planning or audit status lines and the technical plan still preserved the retired parent-root publication boundary as current technical truth.
execution_scope: Update the milestone plan, technical plan, and Milestone 1 acceptance checklist so they lead as executed cutover baselines with current-routing context.
Clear the stale parent-root publication-boundary claim from the technical plan's authoritative-surfaces section.
Preserve the detailed milestone, technical, and checklist body content as provenance rather than rewriting the full stack.
forbidden_scope: broad historical-content rewrite beyond top closeout normalization and one stale-boundary correction
success_criteria: The developer-host cutover planning stack now reads as executed cutover baseline guidance instead of an active launch surface.
The technical plan no longer presents `C:/APEX Platform` as the current authoritative publication boundary.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and advances the next lane to older packet-history and routing residue rather than the developer-host cutover planning stack.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-DEVELOPER-HOST-CUTOVER-MILESTONE-PLAN-2026-05-05.md -Pattern '^Status: Executed cutover milestone baseline with closeout-routing context','^Closeout interpretation note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-DEVELOPER-HOST-CUTOVER-TECHNICAL-PLAN-2026-05-05.md -Pattern '^Status: Executed technical cutover baseline with closeout-routing context','^Closeout interpretation note:','^Current routing:'

Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-DEVELOPER-HOST-CUTOVER-MILESTONE-1-ACCEPTANCE-CHECKLIST-2026-05-05.md -Pattern '^Status: Executed Milestone 1 audit baseline with closeout-routing context','^Closeout interpretation note:','^Current routing:'
Select-String -Path docs/architecture/OLARES-DEVELOPER-HOST-CUTOVER-TECHNICAL-PLAN-2026-05-05.md -Pattern 'C:/APEX Platform remains the current transitional authoritative publication boundary'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to older packet-history and legacy routing surfaces that still preserve pre-cutover operator wording without equivalent current-routing context.
